query:
SELECT (status = 'success' OR EXISTS (
                        SELECT 1 FROM v2_job_completed cc JOIN v2_job jc ON jc.id = cc.id
                        WHERE jc.parent_job = j.id AND jc.runnable_id = j.runnable_id AND jc.flow_innermost_root_job IS NULL AND cc.status = 'success'
                    )) AS "success!",
                    result AS "result: Json<Box<RawValue>>",
                    started_at AS "started_at!"FROM v2_job j JOIN v2_job_completed USING (id)
                WHERE j.workspace_id = $1 AND trigger_kind = 'schedule' AND trigger = $2
                    AND parent_job IS NULL
                    AND runnable_path = $3
                    AND j.id != $4
                ORDER BY created_at DESC
                LIMIT $5
